prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约12381→10208→8155→6217→4095，呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约8300名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年基准约4095名，较2024年大幅 前移约2122名，热度显著上升；本省物理类计划2021–2024年稳定在87–90人，2025年缩减至57人，2026年进一步缩减至52人，较2025年缩招约8.8%，供给 减少加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第23名，近年排名稳定在21–25区间，属顶尖工科院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要 涉及校园安全事件（学生被校外人员殴打、校方被指偏袒），可能轻微影响报考信心；抖音热度排名第74（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热关注信号；历史无投档断档记 录；航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-等7个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力 强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等西工大核心专业大类社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1. 58万人（+3.6%），竞争基数扩大；西工大位于陕西西安，属西北地区，在广东省无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年计划缩招约8.8%及广东物理类考生增加约3.6%，竞争压力进一步加大，但声誉偏负面事件可能对报 考热度产生轻微抑制。，考虑声誉降温的有限抵消作用，预测2026年最低位次约3910名，区间3410–4410名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12381 → 10208 → 8155 → 6217 → 4095, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 8300 positions in the past 4 years, indicating intensifying competition year by year; the 2025 baseline is about 4095, a significant forward shift of about 2122 positions compared to 2024, with a notable increase in popularity; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was stable at 87–90 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 57 in 2025, and further reduced to 52 in 2026, a decrease of about 8.8% compared to 2025, with reduced supply intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 21–25 range in recent years, belonging to top engineering institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students assaulted by off-campus individuals, the school accused of favoritism), which may slightly affect application confidence; Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (average), with moderate short video exposure, no high attention signals; no history of enrollment gaps; Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, and 7 other A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other core major categories of NPU continue to be popular/highly recommended; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, expanding the competition base; NPU is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, with no local enrollment preference in Guangdong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of a significant forward shift in the 2025 ranking, the planned enrollment reduction of about 8.8% in 2026, and the increase of about 3.6% in Guangdong Physics Category candidates, competitive pressure will further increase, but the negative reputation incidents may have a slight inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. Taking into account the limited offsetting effect of reputation cooling, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3910, with a range of 3410–4410.

NPU has outstanding engineering strength, with dual A+ disciplines in Aerospace and Computer Science, making it highly competitive and suitable for high-scoring candidates with a strong interest in national defense, military industry, and information technology.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的降温走势、2026年计划缩招约8.3%及广东历史类考生大幅增加约 11.6%，竞争压力加剧，但西工大历史类专业非其优势领域，吸引力有限。，考虑考生大增的竞争效应与历史类专业吸引力不足的叠加影响，预测2 026年最低位次约3971名，区间3471–4471名。

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top-tier engineering institution, but History Category is not its strength. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong is about 326,200, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 2025, significantly expanding the competition base. NPU is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, with no local enrollment preference in Guangdong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the cooling trend of a significant ranking drop in 2025, the planned enrollment reduction of about 8.3% in 2026, and the substantial increase of about 11.6% in History Category examinees in Guangdong, competitive pressure intensifies. However, NPU's History Category majors are not its strength and have limited appeal. Taking into account the combined effect of increased competition from the surge in examinees and the lack of appeal of History Category majors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3971, with a range of 3471–4471.
